items.title: T.I. COOKS Luke Kornet For Magic City Night Cancellation 🤣

items.body_excerpt: T.I. couldn't wait to let Luke Kornet know how he felt about his Magic City Night complaints 😭 #shorts #7pminbrooklyn #carmeloanthony #nba #ti #atlanta #atlantahawks #magiccity #basketball . . . New episodes drop every Monday. Subscribe to the podcast on Spotify, Apple, or…
